hero.subtitle: JUT transforms how businesses capture leads, manage conversations, and drive sales — automatically, across every channel.

how.label: How It Works
how.title: From comment to closed deal
how.subtitle: Three intelligent steps that turn passive social engagement into active revenue — automatically.
how.step1_desc: A prospect comments on your reel, post, or story. JUT detects it instantly and activates the right automation flow based on your rules.
how.step2_desc: Your AI agent sends a natural, human-like DM. It qualifies the lead, answers questions, and guides them through your sales flow — 24/7.
how.step3_desc: Captured leads land in your CRM. Deals close through your integrated sales flow. Revenue happens while you focus on what matters.

features.label: Platform Capabilities
features.title: Everything you need to dominate
features.ai_desc: Natural, contextual, brand-aware AI that chats like your best salesperson — 24 hours a day, in any language.
features.triggers_desc: Keyword-based comment detection across Instagram posts, reels, and carousels that fires DM flows instantly.
features.crm_desc: Capture, qualify, and track every lead. Full conversation history, stages, tags, and activity timelines.
features.builder_desc: Design multi-step flows, branching logic, and conditional sequences — all in a visual, intuitive builder.
features.pos_desc: Sell products, services, and packages directly inside the platform. Full order management and payment flows.
features.analytics_desc: Real-time performance data on automations, lead conversion, message engagement, and revenue attribution.

why.label: Why JUT
why.title: Not just automation. Operations intelligence.
why.subtitle: JUT is not a chatbot. Not a CRM. Not a workflow tool. It's all three — unified, AI-powered, and built for commercial results.
why.card1_desc: Every message JUT sends is configured to match your brand voice, tone, and selling style. No robotic scripts. No generic replies. Pure human-like intelligence.
why.card2_desc: JUT isn't just about engagement — it's wired for commercial outcomes. Every flow, trigger, and message is designed to move prospects toward a purchase decision.
why.card3_desc: JUT is architected for every channel — Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, and beyond. Start where your audience is. Expand without rebuilding anything.
why.card4_desc: Whether you're a solo creator or running multiple businesses — JUT gives you enterprise-grade automation without enterprise-grade complexity.

cta.label: Get Started
cta.title: Your business runs. JUT sells.
cta.subtitle: Join the operators who've put their commercial conversations on autopilot. Start free. Scale fast.
cta.note: No credit card required · Setup in minutes · Cancel anytime

footer.description: The AI-powered commercial operations platform for businesses that want to sell smarter, not harder.
